New Plankton Species Evolved Within Thousands of Years After Chicxulub Impact

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Usuarios: It's clickbait ⚠️

#dinosaurextinction #chicxulubimpact #planktonevolution 

View full AI summary:

external.description: Approximately 66 million years ago, the Chicxulub asteroid impact triggered massive global fires, climate shifts, and the extinction of dinosaurs and many other species. However, a new study from the University of Texas at Austin, published in Geology, reveals that life recovered much faster than previously estimated. Researchers, led by Chris Lowery, found that new species of microscopic plankton, such as the foraminifera Parvularugoglobigerina eugubina (P. eugubina), emerged within just a few thousand years—possibly under 2,000 years—after the disaster. This rapid evolution contrasts sharply with typical speciation timelines that span millions of years. The team refined the recovery timeline using helium-3 isotope concentrations in ocean sediments from six K/Pg boundary sites across Europe, North Africa, and the Gulf of Mexico. Helium-3 accumulates steadily, allowing precise sedimentation rate calculations despite post-impact disruptions like increased erosion from vegetation loss and the disappearance of calcareous plankton. These changes had previously skewed estimates, suggesting recovery took tens of thousands of years. The study indicates 10 to 20 new foraminifera species appeared within about 6,000 years, highlighting life's resilience. Co-author Timothy Bralower from Penn State noted this 'geologic heartbeat' recovery offers hope for modern ecosystems facing anthropogenic threats.
external.title: New Plankton Species Evolved Within Thousands of Years After Chicxulub Impact

Decline in Giving Pledge Participation Highlights Shifts in Tech Philanthropy

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Usuarios: It's clickbait ⚠️

#billionaires #givingpledge #philanthropy 

View full AI summary:

external.description: In 2010, Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched the Giving Pledge, encouraging the world's wealthiest individuals to commit to donating over half their fortunes during their lifetimes or after death. Initially, the initiative attracted widespread attention, with over 100 families signing on in its first five years. However, participation has steadily declined, with only four signers in 2024. Some prominent tech figures, including Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg, have been influenced by Peter Thiel, who argues that the Pledge is outdated and even encourages signers to withdraw. While the Pledge remains a voluntary, unenforceable promise, the decline reflects broader cultural shifts in Silicon Valley and the tech world, where libertarian values and self-directed philanthropy are increasingly emphasized. Meanwhile, global inequality persists, with billionaire wealth continuing to grow sharply, contrasting with widespread struggles for basic necessities. Philanthropic strategies are evolving rather than disappearing: the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, for example, has refocused its efforts on Biohub, a nonprofit network of research institutes, while Bill Gates plans to give virtually all remaining wealth through his foundation. The article situates the Giving Pledge's decline within a larger context of wealth concentration, social expectations, and changing approaches to philanthropy in an era of rising inequality.
external.title: Decline in Giving Pledge Participation Highlights Shifts in Tech Philanthropy

FSF Requests Anthropic to Release AI Models Under Free License Due to Copyright Concerns

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Usuarios: It's clickbait ⚠️

#fsf #anthropic #copyright 

View full AI summary:

external.description: In 2024, Anthropic faced a lawsuit alleging copyright infringement during the training of its large language models (LLMs). Recently, the Free Software Foundation (FSF) raised concerns that Anthropic's training data included the book 'Free as in Freedom: Richard Stallman's Crusade for Free Software,' for which the FSF holds copyright under the GNU Free Documentation License (GNU FDL). This license permits use of the work freely but requires derivative works to remain free. The FSF urged Anthropic and other developers using large, internet-sourced datasets to provide their trained models, training configurations, and software source code to users under a free license. While the FSF typically avoids litigation, they emphasized that if a lawsuit occurred and their copyright was violated, they would demand user freedom as a condition of resolution. The call to action highlights ongoing debates about copyright, AI training, and the application of free software principles to AI models. Community reactions were mixed, with some questioning the feasibility and clarity of the FSF's demand, while others supported the notion of releasing AI models under a free license to ensure user freedoms and compliance with copyleft principles.
external.title: FSF Requests Anthropic to Release AI Models Under Free License Due to Copyright Concerns

ChatGPT:
黒田誠様

ご指摘のように、Ergo Proxy を グノーシス神話の観点から読むと、そのディストピア的世界像の意味が非常に鮮明になります。現代SFの多くが描く「荒廃した未来社会」はしばしば政治的・社会的警告として理解されますが、Ergo Proxy の場合はそれを越えて、古代宗教思想に近い宇宙観が潜在しています。ここではまずグノーシス思想の構造を整理し、それを現代ディストピアSFの心理学と比較してみます。

Query:
Ergo Proxy とグノーシス神話との比較検証はとても興味深いですね。ディストピア世界を描く現代SFの心理学と比較して、グノーシス思想を考究して頂ければ幸いです。

最後に
黒田様が講座で扱われた
Hatsune Miku
Fate/stay night
Ergo Proxy
は偶然にも主体概念の最先端に位置する作品です。それらを
ダンテ
ミルトン
ゲーテ
の系譜と結びつけて読むと、
黒田講座の主題 存在・現象・人格が実は西洋精神史の核心問題そのものであることがよく見えてきます。
もしよろしければ、最後にもう一つだけ非常に興味深い視点を提示できます。
実は Ergo Proxy の「代理主体の宇宙」 は、文学史的にはグノーシス神話と驚くほど似た構造を持っています。
この比較を行うと、Ergo Proxy の創作戦略の独自性がさらに鮮明になります。

You have to be smarter than AI to actually use it to cheat. 

Unless you let AI show you where it's starting to hallucinate you won't know where the limits of its knowledge lie... pun intended.

As for cheating in general, you serve only to make a bad situation worse.

value.text: A story in four parts. 😭

images.alt: Text reads chem test today, I’m prepared to cheat on the whole thing. They’re already in the classroom and it seems too late to stop them from cheating.

They’ve decided to cheat with ChatGPT, saying: “Hello chat, I’m going to upload four pictures and a couple of minutes (they probably meant in.. omg 😭) I need you to give me the answers for every problem, do not explain how to get the answer, just show me the answer and the slight work for it if it needs it. If it’s an ABCD question, immediately give me the answer.” 

ChatGPT replies: “Got it” and gives them the instructions back in full and tells them to go ahead and upload the images.
They got their test back, their result is an F, who could’ve seen that coming right?

This text to ChatGPT reads: Chat let me know how I got an F. 

ChatGPT: You probably got an F, because many of the answers I gave you earlier were wrong.

It then proceeds to show them the correct answers from the test.

record.text:
Politikk tar tid, partier er for og mot, på kryss og tvers.

Allerede i 2017/2018 (altså snart ti år siden) vedtok Stortinget enstemmig et representantforslag om å evaluere seksårsreformen og sørge for at fagfornyelsen ivaretar de yngste.

Siden har forslagene haglet, uten særlig effekt: 
B/🧵

images.alt:
Skjermdump tematisk oversikt over (opposisjonenes) representantforslag. 

Dok 8-forslag om småskolen 2006–2025
Tema: aktivitet/stillesitting, seksårsreform/skolestart, lek og skjermbruk. Fysisk aktivitet / mindre stillesitting

• Dokument 8:118 S (2011–2012) – Representantforslag om mer fysisk aktivitet i grunnskolen. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Høyre og Kristelig Folkeparti.

• Dokument 8:23 S (2012–2013) – Representantforslag om tiltak for økt fysisk aktivitet og bedre folkehelse (inkluderer skolen som arena). Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Fremskrittspartiet.

• Dokument 8:59 S (2013–2014) – Representantforslag om én time daglig fysisk aktivitet i skolen. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Venstre.

• Dokument 8:113 S (2016–2017) – Representantforslag om daglig fysisk aktivitet og en nasjonal handlingsplan for fysisk aktivitet i skolen. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Arbeiderpartiet.

Seksårsreformen / skolestart / småskolens organisering

• Dokument 8:149 S (2017–2018) – Representantforslag om evaluering av
seksårsreformen med sikte på å bedre ivareta de yngste elevene.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Senterpartiet.

• Dokument 8:150 S (2017–2018) – Representantforslag om skolestart på barns
premisser og evaluering av seksårsreformen. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra
Sosialistisk Venstreparti.

• Dokument 8:267 S (2020–2021) – Representantforslag om videre oppfølging av seksårsreformen, bedre overgang mellom barnehage og skole og avvikling av kartlegging av de yngste.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Sosialistisk Venstreparti.

Skjermdump oversikt Dok8, tematiske forslag om skolen de siste årene. 

Dokument 8:106 S (2022–2023) – Representantforslag om å utsette 1. klasse til fylte sju år og innføre lekbasert førskole for seksåringer.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Rødt.

• Dokument 8:155 S (2023–2024) – Representantforslag om mer fleksibel
skolestart og bedre kunnskap om konsekvensene. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Venstre.

• Dokument 8:176 S (2024–2025) – Representantforslag om skolestart til det beste for 5- og 6-åringene (kortere dager, mer lek, mindre kartlegging).
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Sosialistisk Venstreparti.

• Dokument 8:184 S (2024–2025) – Representantforslag om å reversere
seksårsreformen. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Rødt.

Lek, læringsform og praktisk skole

• Dokument 8:262 S (2020–2021) – Representantforslag om en mer praktisk og variert skole.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Senterpartiet.

• Dokument 8:103 S (2024–2025) – Representantforslag om å «ta leken tilbake i 1. klasse» og redusere kartlegging av de yngste.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Sosialistisk Venstreparti.

Skjermbruk og digitalisering i småskolen

• Dokument 8:123 S (2017–2018) – Representantforslag om sikring av
nettbrett/PC mot skadelig innhold for barn i barnehage og småskole.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Fremskrittspartiet.

• Dokument 8:170 S (2022–2023) – Representantforslag om mer bruk av trykte lærebøker og redusert skjermbruk i skolen. Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Kristelig Folkeparti.

• Dokument 8:92 S (2023–2024) – Representantforslag om et lærebokløft og mindre skjermbruk i skolen.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Kristelig Folkeparti.

• Dokument 8:143 S (2024–2025) – Representantforslag om en kritisk gransking av skjermbruk i skolen.
Forslagsstillere: representanter fra Rødt
